overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in futuristic armor exploring a warm-lit industrial space station interior. The character walks past storage crates and a seated NPC in a curved corridor, then transitions through a doorway into a workshop area with workbenches and equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved storage corridor with planter boxes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved corridor toward a metal doorway, passing wooden crates and greenery

notable_agents.action: seated in a chair against the wall, observing the area

entered.detail: large rectangular planter with dense green foliage and branches
stack of wooden shipping crates with yellow safety railing on top
tall white storage locker against the left wall
exposed industrial pipes and conduits running along the ceiling
large metal door frame leading to adjacent corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a curved indoor corridor with warm artificial lighting. A planter with greenery lines the left wall while stacked wooden crates sit on the right. A seated NPC watches from the left as the character approaches a metal doorway at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial workshop with workbenches and storage

events.description: passing through metal doorway frame into the larger workshop area

agents.ego_description: entering the workshop space and walking toward workbenches and equipment

entered.detail: metal wall-mounted ladder with safety rails leading to upper level
large workbench with scattered tools and equipment
thick yellow cable running along the floor
tall metal shelving unit with storage boxes
wooden desk with chair and items on surface

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the doorway into a larger industrial workshop. The space features workbenches, metal shelving, and a ladder mounted on the left wall. The character walks past the ladder and approaches a wooden desk and workbench area while yellow cables run along the floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, warm-lit corridor into a spacious industrial workshop. It begins by tracking the character through a curved hallway lined with greenery on the left and stacked wooden crates on the right, passing a seated NPC who watches from the side. As the character reaches the end of the passage, the camera glides through a metal doorway, causing the environment to open up into a larger workspace. The scene then expands to reveal metal shelving and a wall-mounted ladder, with the camera following the character past yellow floor cables toward a wooden desk and workbench area.
